title: Delivery Control Re-run: VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 through 034

steps.action: Install autoresearch-improver plugin via API POST /api/plugins/install with local path
Navigate to Test Company projects page

steps.result: Autopilot tab loaded with disabled autopilot (checkbox unchecked)

steps.action: Check 'Enable Product Autopilot' checkbox and save settings
steps.result: Autopilot enabled. Settings saved successfully. Automation Tier dropdown appeared.
Three options visible: Supervised, Semi-Auto, Full Auto. Dropdown is interactable.
Section heading 'Delivery Runs' visible with empty state 'No delivery runs yet.'
Budget tab shows project-level budget: $0.00 observed, Budget: Disabled. No autopilot-paused indicator visible.

steps.action: Inspect Pause/Resume controls in Autopilot tab
steps.result: 'Pause Autopilot' button visible in Autopilot Settings section. 'Resume Autopilot' button not visible (would only appear after pausing).

VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.title: Planning flow is created for approved ideas
VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.finding: recordSwipe action handler IS registered in root worker.ts at line 3511 (AUTOPILOT_ACTION_KEYS.recordSwipe). The Swipe Review section is visible in the UI. However, fully testing the flow (add idea -> swipe Yes/Now -> planning artifact created) requires first creating ideas in the Ideas section. The round 2 blocker 'No action handler registered for key record-swipe' appears to be resolved in code, but the full end-to-end flow was not exercised in this session.
VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.improvement: The code shows recordSwipe is registered at worker.ts:3511. Round 2 may have tested against a stale build. The UI flow requires creating ideas first before swipe review is active.

VAL-AUTOPILOT-031.title: Automation tiers enforce the configured approval path
VAL-AUTOPILOT-031.finding: Automation Tier dropdown IS VISIBLE and INTERACTABLE after enabling autopilot. Three options available: Supervised, Semi-Auto, Full Auto. The dropdown selection works. However, verifying that each tier enforces its configured approval/merge behavior requires creating actual delivery runs — which is only possible after the full idea->swipe->planning flow (VAL-AUTOPILOT-030) works.
VAL-AUTOPILOT-031.improvement: Round 2 blocker 'Automation tier dropdown non-interactive' is RESOLVED. Dropdown is now fully interactable.

tiers: Supervised — requires approval for each run
Semi-Auto — runs automatically, pauses on issues

VAL-AUTOPILOT-032.title: Delivery run uses an isolated workspace and leased port
VAL-AUTOPILOT-032.finding: DeliveryRunSection IS VISIBLE in the Autopilot tab with heading 'Delivery Runs' and empty state 'No delivery runs yet.' The section renders using usePluginData<DeliveryRun[]>(DATA_KEYS.deliveryRuns). However, cannot verify workspace path, branch name, or leased port metadata without creating an actual delivery run first.
VAL-AUTOPILOT-032.improvement: Round 2 blocker 'UI has no DeliveryRunSection' is RESOLVED. The DeliveryRunSection component is now present and visible.

VAL-AUTOPILOT-033.title: Budget caps pause future runs
VAL-AUTOPILOT-033.finding: The Budget tab shows project-level budget (USD) input with '0.00' value and 'Set budget' button. The Autopilot Settings shows 'Budget (minutes per week)' with '60' minutes. However, when autopilot is NOT paused (currently running normally), there is no 'paused' state indicator. The UI does not display a pause reason badge or message when autopilot would be paused due to budget cap exceeded. The backend enforces pause when autopilotUsedMinutes >= autopilotBudgetMinutes (checkBudgetAndPauseIfNeeded action), but the UI never shows this paused state.
VAL-AUTOPILOT-033.blocker: Budget pause state (companyBudget.paused = true with pauseReason) is not surfaced in the UI. No visual indicator shows when autopilot is paused due to budget cap.

VAL-AUTOPILOT-034.title: Operator can pause and resume autopilot or a specific run
VAL-AUTOPILOT-034.finding: 'Pause Autopilot' button IS VISIBLE in the Autopilot Settings section after enabling autopilot. The backend registers pauseAutopilot and resumeAutopilot actions at worker.ts:2883 and :2904. However, testing the full pause->resume flow requires clicking the button and observing the UI state change to 'Resume Autopilot' (which was not exercised in this session). Run-level pause/resume cannot be tested without delivery runs (VAL-AUTOPILOT-032 prerequisite).
VAL-AUTOPILOT-034.improvement: Round 2 blocker 'No Pause/Resume buttons in UI' is RESOLVED. The Pause Autopilot button is now present.

improvementsFromRound2.VAL-AUTOPILOT-030: recordSwipe action IS registered in root worker.ts at line 3511 (was missing in round 2)
improvementsFromRound2.VAL-AUTOPILOT-031: Automation Tier dropdown is NOW VISIBLE and INTERACTABLE after enabling autopilot
improvementsFromRound2.VAL-AUTOPILOT-032: DeliveryRunSection IS NOW VISIBLE in the Autopilot tab
improvementsFromRound2.VAL-AUTOPILOT-033: Budget pause state still NOT VISIBLE in UI — unchanged from round 2
improvementsFromRound2.VAL-AUTOPILOT-034: Pause/Resume buttons ARE NOW VISIBLE in Autopilot Settings

frictions.description: The plugin required manual installation via API (POST /api/plugins/install with localPath) since it is not published to npm registry

blockers.description: VAL-AUTOPILOT-033: Budget pause state (autopilot.paused=true with pauseReason) is not displayed in the Budget tab or Autopilot Settings. The backend enforces the pause but the UI never shows the paused condition.
blockers.suggestedFix: Add a pause state indicator in the Budget tab or Autopilot Settings that displays when autopilot is paused due to budget cap. Show pauseReason text prominently.

blockers.description: VAL-AUTOPILOT-030: Full end-to-end flow (create idea -> swipe Yes/Now -> planning artifact) was not exercised. recordSwipe handler is registered but needs actual idea creation to test.
blockers.suggestedFix: Create an idea through the Ideas section, then swipe it as Yes/Now through the Swipe Review section, then verify a planning artifact appears.

systemicIssues.description: VAL-AUTOPILOT-031, VAL-AUTOPILOT-032, VAL-AUTOPILOT-034: Approval enforcement, workspace metadata, and run-level pause cannot be tested without creating actual delivery runs. These are blocked by the prerequisite idea->swipe->planning flow (VAL-AUTOPILOT-030).
systemicIssues.suggestedFix: Fix VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 first to unblock the dependent assertions.

verdict: mixed - 3 of 5 assertions show improvement, 2 remain blocked or failed
